title: Dulux Once Satinwood Paint For Wood And Metal - Pure Brilliant White 750 ml
description: From the manufacturer Dulux Once Satinwood Paint For Wood And Metal A one coat paint for interior wood and metal giving a beautiful satin finish. Dulux Once Satinwood has been specially formulated to give a perfect satin finish on interior primed or painted wood or metal surfaces in just one coat. It does not require an undercoat. Application Description Apply using a clean, good quality brush. Apply a thick even coat of paint taking care not to spread it too far. Failure to do so may require a second coat, particularly when painting over a darker colour with a lighter topcoat. Leave a minimum of 16 hours between coats. Product Features One coat No undercoat required Finish: Satin Tips and Advice Preparing the Surfaces: Remove flaking or defective paint and sand down the surface to remove any sheen. Refer to health, safety and environmental information. Make sure the surface is clean (no dirt or grease) and dry Cleaning : For best results, scrape off excess paint from the brush and clean with Polycell Brush Cleaner Storing: Store paint in dry conditions and protect from extreme temperatures
